execution_note: Phase 2 run INLINE — subagents cannot spawn subagents.

decisions.question: How is a child's result recorded on completion: auto-promote vs explicit step?
Result-envelope type and exact field set?
Result storage location + dereference, index stays lean?
decisions.chosen: 3A result on child session log (request_store.result event) + bounded has_result flag in index + result copy on parent ChildCompleted to survive cleanup

decisions.question: Converge surfacing via GateBlocked; converge-set definition?
decisions.chosen: 4A reuse children-complete gate + GateBlocked; result field on each child entry

cross_validation_note: No conflicts. D1/D2/D3 share the TerminalOutcome projection; D3's cleanup-race resolution (result on parent ChildCompleted) is exactly what D4 dereferences. Decisions mutually reinforce.
